author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit bc602d96. Added WorkerMode enum (IntraBatch default, CrossBatch new) with a MultiWorkerIter that spawns num_workers dedicated threads pulling WorkItems from a shared Mutex<VecDeque> work queue and returning tagged WorkResults through an mpsc channel. BinaryHeap reorder buffer yields batches in sampler order. Clean Drop shutdown via None sentinels + notify_all. CrossBatch with num_workers=0 falls back to Prefetch path. 11 new tests; 158 ferrotorch-data tests pass.
